calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2013 Off Calendar

Notice To Obtain Default Prove-Up Hearing Date
Off Calendar Jun-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Paul J. Steiner, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff, Linda McDonald.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Trip Assured, Inc. and Edward M. Johnson
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Doe Defendants dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Paul Steiner admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Linda McDonald and against Defendant Trip Assured and Edward M Johnson as follows:

Damages: $91,618.37
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,422.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $93,041.17
Judgment signed in open court.
